image:image.image:title: GoldPriceTools — Live Gold and Silver Price Calculator
image:image.image:caption: Free real-time gold and silver price calculator showing live 10K, 14K, 18K and 24K gold price per gram, scrap gold value, and silver spot price — updated every 60 seconds.

image:image.image:title: GoldPriceTools Logo
image:image.image:caption: GoldPriceTools — live gold and silver price tools

image:image.image:title: 14K Gold Price Per Gram Today — Live GoldPriceTools
image:image.image:caption: Live 14K gold price per gram in USD, GBP and EUR. 14 karat gold is 58.33% pure. Updated every 60 seconds.

image:image.image:title: 18K Gold Price Per Gram Today — Live GoldPriceTools
image:image.image:caption: Live 18K gold price per gram in USD, GBP and EUR. 18 karat gold is 75% pure — the most popular karat for jewellery. Updated every 60 seconds.

image:image.image:title: 10K Gold Price Per Gram Today — Live GoldPriceTools
image:image.image:caption: Live 10K gold price per gram in USD, GBP and EUR. 10 karat gold is 41.67% pure — minimum US gold standard. Updated every 60 seconds.

image:image.image:title: Scrap Gold Calculator — Live Melt Value by Karat
image:image.image:caption: Free scrap gold calculator showing live melt value for 9K, 10K, 14K, 18K and 24K gold by weight in grams. Updated in real time.

image:image.image:title: Silver Price Per Kilo Today — Live GoldPriceTools
image:image.image:caption: Live silver price per kilogram in USD and GBP. Also shows .999 fine silver, 925 sterling silver and silver per troy ounce. Updated every 60 seconds.

image:image.image:title: How Many Grams in a Troy Ounce — Weight Converter
image:image.image:caption: 1 troy ounce = 31.1035 grams. Complete gold and silver weight converter: grams, troy ounces, pennyweight, kilograms and more.

image:image.image:title: What Is 14K Gold? Purity, Value and How to Identify It
image:image.image:caption: Guide to 14K gold: what 58.33% purity means, hallmarks to look for, and how to calculate its value at today's live spot price.

image:image.image:title: How to Calculate Scrap Gold Value — Step by Step Guide
image:image.image:caption: Step-by-step guide to calculating scrap gold value using the live spot price, weight and karat purity.

image:image.image:title: Troy Ounce vs Gram — The Complete Precious Metals Guide
image:image.image:caption: Explains why precious metals are weighed in troy ounces (31.1035g) rather than regular ounces (28.35g) and how to convert between units.

image:image.image:title: Gold Purity Guide — 9K to 24K Karat Explained
image:image.image:caption: Complete guide to gold karat purity: what each karat means, hallmarks, uses and current value from 9K to 24K gold.

image:image.image:title: What Is 925 Sterling Silver and How Much Is It Worth?
image:image.image:caption: Guide to 925 sterling silver: 92.5% purity, hallmarks, uses in jewellery, and how to calculate its live melt value.

image:image.image:title: When Is the Best Time to Sell Scrap Gold?
image:image.image:caption: Guide to timing scrap gold sales: what drives gold prices, seasonal patterns, and how to get the best price from dealers.

image:image.image:title: Gold Price History — Key Milestones From 1970 to 2026
image:image.image:caption: Historical gold price chart and guide covering major milestones: Nixon Shock 1971, 1980 peak, 2008 crisis, 2020 all-time high, and 2026 prices.

image:image.image:title: How to Read a Gold Spot Price — Beginner's Guide
image:image.image:caption: Beginner's guide to gold spot prices: what the spot price means, where it comes from, and how to use it to value gold jewellery and bars.

image:image.image:title: How to Invest in Gold — Bullion, ETFs and More
image:image.image:caption: Guide to investing in gold: comparing physical bullion, gold ETFs, mining stocks and gold ISAs with pros, cons and current price context.

image:image.image:title: Gold vs Silver Investment — Which Precious Metal Is Better?
image:image.image:caption: Comparison of gold and silver as investments: historical returns, volatility, gold-silver ratio, and which metal suits different investor profiles.

image:image.image:title: How to Sell Gold Jewellery — Get the Best Price Guide
image:image.image:caption: Step-by-step guide to selling gold jewellery: how to calculate melt value, find the best buyer, and avoid common pitfalls when selling gold.

image:image.image:title: Silver Price Per Gram Explained — Live Calculation Guide
image:image.image:caption: Guide explaining how the silver price per gram is calculated from the troy ounce spot price, with live examples for .999 fine and 925 sterling silver.
